name: How much is my on-the-job back injury worth in Sandy UT?
description: Based on meds, wages lost, and impairment; consult for $20K-$100K+ estimate.[3]

mainEntity.name: How much is my on-the-job back injury worth in Sandy UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Based on meds, wages lost, and impairment; consult for $20K-$100K+ estimate.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Value depends on medical costs, lost wages, disability rating, and pain; average settlements vary widely from $20K-$100K+.**[3]

Utah workers' comp pays actual medical bills, 66 2/3% of average weekly wage (up to state max ~$1,200/week), and permanent partial disability based on impairment.

- Severe cases with surgery/permanent limits yield higher awards.
- No pain/suffering damages in pure workers' comp.
- Third-party negligence adds economic/non-economic damages.[3]

Get an impairment rating post-healing. Attorney negotiations often double insurer offers.
